cases.name: sample_flow_up_to_insert_8
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list is: 2 3 5 7 8 9
The value 8 was added at index 4
The resulting sorted linked list is: 2 3 5 7 8 9

cases.name: sample_flow_duplicate_5_returns_minus_1
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list is: 2 3 5 7 8 9
The value 5 was added at index -1
The resulting sorted linked list is: 2 3 5 7 8 9

cases.name: sample_flow_insert_11_at_index_6
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list is: 2 3 5 7 8 9 11
The value 11 was added at index 6
The resulting sorted linked list is: 2 3 5 7 8 9 11

cases.name: reject_duplicate_value_from_separate_example
expect_contains_all: The value 7 was added at index -1
The resulting sorted linked list is: 5 7 9 11 15

cases.name: insert_smallest_to_front
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list is: 5 10 20 30
The value 5 was added at index 0
The resulting sorted linked list is: 5 10 20 30

cases.name: single_item_list_reports_index_zero
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list is: 42
The value 42 was added at index 0
The resulting sorted linked list is: 42

cases.name: negative_values_stay_sorted
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list is: -10 -3 0 4
The value -10 was added at index 0
The resulting sorted linked list is: -10 -3 0 4
